Sage Bot Item Code: D15


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Red Dragon
Guardian of Northern Kingdom Daggers

When attacking, has a a [12%-13%] chance of dealing [100%-120%] damage in 5 seconds.
For the duration of the battle, the unit's attacks reduce the target's physical armor by 10% for 6 sec (stacks up to 10 times) and restore 5% of the unit's max health. If the unit's health drops below 35%, the attack restores health equal to 100% of the damage dealt by the attack.

Requirements: 98-100
